**The problem**

(What user-facing situation are we solving? Bug-shaped problems work better than "add X to Y" — describe the pain first.)

**Proposed direction (optional)**

(If you have a specific implementation in mind. Skip this if you don't — the maintainers will figure out shape.)

**Why this fits MusicTidy**

(Is this self-host-friendly? Privacy-preserving? Does it depend on closed-source infra? MusicTidy aims to stay simple + self-contained.)

**Workaround you're using today**

(Helps prioritize.)
